description: Have your agents measure and improve your brand's AI Visibility with botsee.io. Run audits across every major LLM, see what's missing, then get specific recommendations and ready-to-publish content to close the gap. API-first, agent-native

tools.name: account_get
tools.description: Returns account details including company name, site count, and owner information.

tools.name: analysis_get
tools.description: Returns analysis details including status. Poll this endpoint until status is 'completed' or 'failed'. Required: uuid.

tools.name: analysis_run
tools.description: Starts an analysis run. This is asynchronous - poll GET /api/v1/analysis/:uuid for status. Returns 202 Accepted. Required: site_uuid. Optional: models (default: [openai claude perplexity]), scope (default: site), target_uuids.

params.name: models
params.description: AI models: openai, claude, perplexity, gemini, grok

params.name: target_uuids
params.description: Required for non-site scope. UUIDs of customer types, personas, or questions.

tools.name: analysis_competitors_analysis
tools.description: Returns competitors mentioned in responses, grouped by customer type. Each competitor includes appearance percentage (% of responses mentioning them), mentions count, average ranking, and confidence scores. Required: uuid.

tools.name: analysis_content_generate
tools.description: Generates a blog post from analysis results for a specific question. Costs 15 credits. Required: analysis_uuid, question_uuid. Optional: keywords, provider (default: gemini). Returns the new ContentGenerateResponse.

params.name: question_uuid
params.description: Question UUID to base the post on

tools.name: analysis_keyword-opportunities_analysis
tools.description: Returns questions where your brand's mention rate is below a threshold. Use this to discover which queries you should target with content. Results include a per-provider breakdown with the search keywords used and your brand's rank position. Required: uuid. Optional: threshold, rank_threshold.

params.name: threshold
params.description: Mention rate threshold (0.0–1.0). Questions where mention_rate < threshold are returned. Default 1.0 returns any question where brand was missed at least once.

params.name: rank_threshold
params.description: Also flag questions where brand appeared at rank worse than this value, even if mention rate meets the threshold.

tools.name: analysis_keywords_analysis
tools.description: Returns aggregated keywords/search terms from all responses. Required: uuid.

tools.name: analysis_recommendations_analysis
tools.description: Generates actionable recommendations from the analysis (cached after first call). Costs 5 credits the first time; subsequent calls return the cached result. Required: uuid. Returns the new RecommendationsAnalysisResponse.

tools.name: analysis_responses_analysis
tools.description: Returns raw AI model responses for the analysis. Required: uuid.

tools.name: analysis_source-opportunities_analysis
tools.description: Returns sources that AI cited in responses where your brand was NOT mentioned. These are high-value targets for outreach or content placement — getting coverage on these sources may improve your AI visibility. Required: uuid.

tools.name: analysis_sources_analysis
tools.description: Returns aggregated sources cited across all responses, with own_company_mentioned flag. Required: uuid.

tools.name: api-keys_create
tools.description: Creates a new API key. The raw key is returned only once in the response body — store it immediately. Optional: name (default: API Key). Returns the new ApiKeysCreateResponse.

tools.name: api-keys_delete
tools.description: Revokes an API key. You cannot revoke the key being used to make this request — use rotate or another key. Required: id. Destructive.

tools.name: api-keys_list
tools.description: Lists all API keys for the organization (raw key never returned). Returns the ApiKeysListResponse.

tools.name: api-keys_reset
tools.description: Exchanges a one-time reset token (from email) for a fresh API key. Public endpoint — no Bearer auth required, the token authenticates the request. Required: token. Returns the new ApiKeysResetResponse. (public)

params.name: token
params.description: Single-use reset token from the reset email.

tools.name: api-keys_rotate_api-key
tools.description: Atomically creates a new API key with the same name and revokes the old one. Returns the new raw key once. Required: id.

tools.name: billing_get-settings
tools.description: Returns the organization's billing settings and current credit balance.

tools.name: billing_topoff-via-x402
tools.description: Discovery call without payment headers returns 402 and does not require auth. Final paid retry requires API key (Authorization, x-api-key, or api_key query param) and supports both `payment` and `payment-signature` headers. Method-compatible with POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE. Optional: api_key, amount_cents. (public)

params.name: api_key
params.description: Alternative auth for facilitator-driven final paid retry

params.name: amount_cents
params.description: Amount in USD cents (250-100000, i.e., $2.50-$1000). Optional for discovery-only 402 challenge (defaults to configured discovery amount).

tools.name: billing_update-settings
tools.description: Updates the organization's monthly spend limit. Other settings are read-only via this endpoint. Optional: monthly_spend_limit_cents. Returns the updated BillingUpdateSettingsResponse.

params.name: monthly_spend_limit_cents
params.description: Maximum spend per calendar month in cents. Cannot exceed max_monthly_spend_cents.

tools.name: botsee-auth_validate
tools.description: Validates the API key and returns organization info and credit balance.

tools.name: customer-types_delete
tools.description: Archives a customer type. Returns 204 No Content on success. Required: uuid. Destructive.

tools.name: customer-types_get
tools.description: Returns a customer type with its personas. Required: uuid.

tools.name: customer-types_update
tools.description: Updates a customer type. Only include fields you want to change. Required: uuid. Optional: description, name. Returns the updated CustomerTypesUpdateResponse.

tools.name: customer-types_personas_create
tools.description: Creates a persona manually. Costs 5 credits. Required: customer_type_uuid, description, name. Returns the new PersonasCreateResponse.

tools.name: customer-types_personas_generate
tools.description: Uses AI to generate personas based on the customer type. Costs 5 credits per persona. Optionally pass `prompt` to steer the LLM toward a specific persona within the customer segment (requires `count: 1`). Required: customer_type_uuid. Optional: count (default: 3), prompt. Returns the new PersonasGenerateResponse.

params.name: prompt
params.description: Free-text hint (max 2000 chars) that steers generation toward a specific persona. Only supported with count: 1. When omitted, the generator produces diverse personas across the customer segment.

tools.name: customer-types_personas_list
tools.description: Lists all personas for a customer type. Required: customer_type_uuid. Returns the PersonasListResponse.

tools.name: personas_delete
tools.description: Archives a persona. Returns 204 No Content on success. Required: uuid. Destructive.

tools.name: personas_get
tools.description: Returns a persona with its questions. Required: uuid.

tools.name: personas_update
tools.description: Updates a persona. Only include fields you want to change. Required: uuid. Optional: description, name. Returns the updated PersonasUpdateResponse.

tools.name: personas_questions_create
tools.description: Creates a question manually. Free operation. Required: persona_uuid, question. Optional: category (default: problem_solving), priority (default: medium). Returns the new QuestionsCreateResponse.

params.name: question
params.description: The question text to ask AI models

tools.name: personas_questions_generate
tools.description: Uses AI to generate questions based on the persona and site context. Costs 10 credits flat. Required: persona_uuid. Optional: count (default: 5). Returns the new QuestionsGenerateResponse.

tools.name: personas_questions_list
tools.description: Lists all questions for a persona. Required: persona_uuid. Returns the QuestionsListResponse.

tools.name: pricing_get
tools.description: Returns the credit cost for each chargeable operation. Analysis costs are estimates; the actual debit is computed from real LLM usage at the documented multiplier after the run completes. (public)

tools.name: questions_delete
tools.description: Deletes a question. Returns 204 No Content on success. Required: uuid. Destructive.

tools.name: questions_update
tools.description: Updates a question. Only include fields you want to change. Required: uuid. Optional: category, is_active, priority (plus 1 more). Returns the updated QuestionsUpdateResponse.

tools.name: questions_results_question
tools.description: Returns analysis results for a specific question. Use the `fields` parameter to include additional data (keywords, competitors, sources, responses). Required: uuid. Optional: fields.

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated fields: keywords, competitors, sources, responses. Default: keywords only.

tools.name: rate-limits_get
tools.description: Returns the caller's current rate-limit state without consuming additional budget. Useful for agents that want to back off proactively before hitting 429.

tools.name: signup_via-cc
tools.description: Creates a credit-card signup token. USDC signups must use `/api/v1/signup/usdc`. Optional: company_name, contact_email, contact_name (plus 1 more). Returns the new SignupViaCcResponse. (public)

tools.name: signup_via-usdc-token
tools.description: Creates a USDC signup token. Use `no_email: true` for autonomous agent flows (no setup_url returned). Optional: company_name, contact_email, contact_name (plus 1 more). Returns the new SignupViaUsdcTokenResponse. (public)

params.name: no_email
params.description: Set to true for autonomous agents that skip email verification

tools.name: signup_pay-usdc_signup-via-x402
tools.description: Call without `payment` header to get a 402 challenge and `payment-required` details. Use Pinch or Coinbase CDP Agentic Wallet to generate the payment header and retry. Required: token, amount_cents. Returns the new PayUsdcSignupViaX402Response. (public)

tools.name: signup_status_signup
tools.description: Polls the status of a signup token. Returns 'pending', 'completed', or 'expired'. Required: token. (public)

tools.name: sites_create
tools.description: Creates a new site. Auto-generates product_name and value_proposition from URL if not provided (5 credits). Required: url. Optional: domain, product_name, value_proposition. Returns the new SitesCreateResponse.

params.name: domain
params.description: Domain override (extracted from URL if not provided)

params.name: product_name
params.description: Product name (auto-generated from URL if not provided, costs 5 credits)

params.name: value_proposition
params.description: Value proposition (auto-generated from URL if not provided, costs 5 credits)

tools.name: sites_delete
tools.description: Archives a site. Returns 204 No Content on success. Required: uuid. Destructive.

tools.name: sites_get
tools.description: Returns a site with its customer types and persona counts. Required: uuid.

tools.name: sites_list
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of sites for the organization. Optional: limit, cursor, include_archived.

tools.name: sites_analysis_list-analyses
tools.description: Lists analysis runs for a site with optional filters. Required: site_uuid. Optional: limit, cursor, persona_uuid (plus 3 more). Returns the AnalysisListAnalysesResponse.

tools.name: sites_customer-types_create
tools.description: Creates a customer type manually. Costs 5 credits. Required: site_uuid, name. Optional: description. Returns the new CustomerTypesCreateResponse.

tools.name: sites_customer-types_generate
tools.description: Uses AI to generate customer types based on the site's product and value proposition. Costs 5 credits per generated type. Required: site_uuid. Optional: count (default: 3). Returns the new CustomerTypesGenerateResponse.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of customer types to generate

tools.name: sites_customer-types_list
tools.description: Lists all customer types for a site. Required: site_uuid. Returns the CustomerTypesListResponse.

tools.name: usage_by-key
tools.description: Returns credit usage breakdown per API key. Optional: from, to.

tools.name: usage_get
tools.description: Returns credit balance, auto-charge settings, and paginated transaction history. Optional: limit, cursor, from (plus 1 more).

tools.name: webhooks_create
tools.description: Registers a webhook URL. Returns the webhook with its signing secret (shown only once). Required: url. Optional: events.

params.name: events
params.description: Events to subscribe to. Call GET /api/v1/webhooks/events for the canonical catalog of currently-emitted event types and their payload schemas.

params.name: url
params.description: HTTPS URL to receive webhook payloads

tools.name: webhooks_delete
tools.description: Deletes a webhook. Returns 204 No Content on success. Required: uuid. Destructive.

tools.name: webhooks_list
tools.description: Lists all registered webhooks for the organization. Returns the WebhooksListResponse.

tools.name: webhooks_list-events
tools.description: Returns the catalog of event types this API can emit, with JSON Schemas per event. Use this to self-discover available events programmatically without parsing the full OpenAPI doc.

tools.name: webhooks_test_webhook
tools.description: Fires a synthetic webhook.test event to the registered URL via the standard delivery worker. Useful for end-to-end testing of signature verification on the subscriber side. Returns 202 with the enqueued Oban job id. Required: uuid.
